---
title: Markdown Stream
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/outputs/markdown-stream/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/outputs/markdown-stream/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 400
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-WFMuAsp4EUEnKnIT70vnM1nC9lrAC6oKELE22x0qogqhWcteuDocA2sK2mpF6ygZSgTPYI14pH6GzgcHQ-gADFgAMxDQioCi4dAIFBgKgKChgAC+8qAA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQEsZ1SAnC5KAZ1wmLtIB0IAM2akYyDgAs6EXMgZNWyAK50izagBM4zIgEFMgwRnQB9VcgC8KujigBzOKaEAbVZoAUg5D5tYZ6MoUplDEFHwQpgBGQRTkXmAcFBqw-
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: '@render.markdown_stream'
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/render.markdown_stream.html
    signature: '@render.markdown_stream'
  - title: ui.output_markdown_stream
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.output_markdown_stream.html
    signature: ui.output_markdown_stream(id, placeholder=False, fill=False, **kwargs)
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A markdown stream output displays markdown content that arrives incrementally, rendering it in real-time as each chunk is received. This is ideal for streaming responses from AI models, chat interfaces, or any scenario where content arrives progressively.

To add markdown streaming output to your app:

  1. Add `ui.output_markdown_stream()` to the UI with a unique `id`.

  2. Create an async generator function decorated with `@render.markdown_stream` that yields markdown content chunks.

  3. As each chunk is yielded, it's immediately rendered and displayed, creating a smooth streaming effect.

**How It Works**: The render function must be an async generator (use `async def` and `yield`):
  - Each `yield` statement sends a chunk of markdown to the browser
  - Chunks are rendered immediately upon arrival
  - Markdown formatting is applied in real-time
  - Perfect for character-by-character or word-by-word streaming

**Use Cases**:
  - **AI Chat Interfaces**: Stream LLM responses as they're generated
  - **Progress Updates**: Show incremental progress with formatted updates
  - **Live Data**: Display data as it arrives from external sources
  - **Typewriter Effects**: Create engaging text reveal animations

**Markdown Support**: All standard markdown features work during streaming:
  - Headers, bold, italic, links
  - Lists (bulleted and numbered)
  - Code blocks with syntax highlighting
  - Tables, blockquotes, horizontal rules

**Integration with Chat**: This component pairs perfectly with `ui.Chat` for building AI-powered chat interfaces where responses stream in naturally.

See Also: [Chat](../../display-messages/chat/index.qmd) provides a complete chat interface component that uses markdown streaming internally.
